task: What is the location of my Movie night event in Simple Calendar Pro? Answer with the location only.

steps.thought:
[Observation]
The current screen is the Android home screen. Visible apps include Gmail, Photos, YouTube, Phone, Messages, Chrome, and another Gmail icon in the dock. The Simple Calendar Pro app is not visible on this main home screen page.

[Plan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app → | Step 2: Search for or navigate to the "Movie night" event | Step 3: View event details to extract the location | Step 4: Output the location

[Decision]
Based on the observation, the target app "Simple Calendar Pro" is not present among the shortcuts on this home screen page. To proceed with finding the event details, I need to launch the Simple Calendar Pro app. Since it's not visible here, I will use the system's open app function to launch it directly.

[Memory]
First action, no prior memory.

[Observation]
The current screen displays the Simple Calendar Pro app in a monthly view for October. Various events are scheduled throughout the month. I can see an event labeled "Movie nig" on October 25th.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Search for or navigate to the "Movie night" event ✓ | Step 3: View event details to extract the location → | Step 4: Output the location

[Decision]
Based on the observation, the "Movie night" event is visible on the calendar on October 25th. To proceed with the plan and view its details to find the location, I need to open this specific event. I will tap on the "Movie nig" event block on the 25th.

[Memory]
Target event "Movie night" located on October 25th. Need to find its location details next.

[Observation]
The screen displays the daily schedule for October 25th. There are three events listed: "Review session for Campaign", "Meeting with Bob", and "Movie night" scheduled from 09:45 to 10:15.

[Reflection]
The previous plan assumed that tapping on the event in the monthly view would open the event details, but it instead opened the daily agenda view for October 25th. I am not yet on the event details page to extract the location.

[Replan]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to the "Movie night" event in the daily view ✓ | Step 3: Open "Movie night" event details → | Step 4: Extract location and output

[Decision]
Based on the current daily agenda view, the "Movie night" event is clearly visible at the bottom of the list. To access its details and find the location as required by the current step in the plan, I need to tap on this specific event block.

[Memory]
Target event "Movie night" located on October 25th. Need to find its location details next.

[Observation]
The screen shows the "Edit Event" page for the "Movie night" event. The title is "Movie night". Below the title, there is a text field for the location which currently contains the text "Mall". There is also a description field, and time details set for October 25 (Wed) from 09:45 to 10:15.

[Plan Update]
Step 1: Open Simple Calendar Pro app ✓ | Step 2: Navigate to the "Movie night" event in the daily view ✓ | Step 3: Open "Movie night" event details ✓ | Step 4: Extract location and output →

[Decision]
Based on the current screen, I have successfully opened the event details. The current step in the plan is to extract the location and output it. Looking at the location field, the text "Mall" is clearly visible. The user's instruction asks for the location of the "Movie night" event in Simple Calendar Pro, and to answer with the location only. I have found the required information ("Mall"), so I will now provide this answer to complete the task.

[Memory]
Target event "Movie night" details accessed. Location identified as "Mall". Task is ready to be completed.
